坏消息：是连载！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747816009,"group_id":"7477901455727283225","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N58uusA0rI8jYnk3wi+PCnHAopJmCO/DLQKv6Bx/ErfQ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/99af03f2893147aca6fa43f79c5c112f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795697&x-signature=FDVLqLC2MKjM%2B05fGlbJxT97sFw%3D","user_id":"4158791742141540","user_name":"施予123"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4158791742141540","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7477901455727283225","book_info":{"abstract":"【漫画师 X 复仇者】陈荷三年前坑掉的一部扑街漫画突然爆火，原因是预言了一宗凶案。
　　网友们在漫画评论区瑟瑟发抖：
　　[你们看新闻了吗，这一幕怎么跟电视上播的一样啊！]
　　[我没有看错吧，尸体是刚刚发现的，漫画是三年前发布的！]
　　[画手是怎么想出这种埋尸地的，有这么巧吗？]
　　[我有一个大胆的猜测……]
　　[作者不会就是凶手吧！]
　　[作者你说句话啊！人不会是你杀的吧！]
　　……
　　面对警方的质疑，陈荷微笑答复：
　　“这只是巧合。我们画漫画的想象力很丰富的。”
现实悬疑，本格推理，无奇幻元素。群像，主角填俩是因为只能填俩。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9299f39b288f7b71957db4cc676aa6a6","author":"红摇","author_id":"","book_id":"7477901455727283225","book_name":"预言成真：漫画杀人事件","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":747,"name":"女频悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=747&name=女频悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1169,"name":"悬疑恋爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1169&name=悬疑恋爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7478199173532090904","read_count":"41251","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"393660"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"190","tags":"女频悬疑,悬疑,推理,破案,群像,悬疑恋爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ace033e9df23f63d1531f3441f3f0d6e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779396890&x-signature=HoBWgi5FZXsg3xC6DCy94ACtwxo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3773122964109728","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"50"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230454502E9C6D57C7AE41F4E23F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":64,"forwarded_coun t":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7746,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":58990},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1749693287,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7525393541929976601","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者塑造的很细腻，社会现实也描绘的很真实。仅针对人物评价，感觉作为正义代表的常警官形象塑造的总让人有些不舒服，仔细想了想，应该是因为他的嗅觉敏锐和打抱不平总在面对权贵时失灵，让人感觉他有些欺软怕硬。比如在女主那一下发现了女主线人的真实身份、一直保持对女主的怀疑，但在朱校长家感到怪异的地方从来不去深究，很轻易的就“理解”了。面对大律师和校长无能但不敢狂怒，一直在表现无奈，但是在女主面前嚣张跋扈，动不动就威胁试探，面对徐三也很强硬看似给他找补了一点，但其实也是面对小人物口舌犀利，面对钱权唯唯诺诺。不过这大概就是真实的人物吧，没有完美的正义化身，都是普通的小人物。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752145440,"group_id":"7477901455727283225","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9K5nh9yRahelLDo4hh3wn0yMbtsAv3Y4tqu7xUYpTIo","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/da5ff441624649e3a000b6324fa30a29~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796318&x-signature=31GVueS4gjtogChHjfxR%2BPG6Owo%3D","user_id":"3767397413819117","user_name":"厌蠢症不想忍"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3767397413819117","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7477901455727283225","book_info":{"abstract":"【漫画师
